summary: Complete testing of 4 fixes: 1) Date format DD-MMM-YY verified across Dashboard, Tasks, Projects, Team, and Task Detail Modal. 2) Deactivated users filter code verified in CreateTask.js, EditTaskModal.js, Projects.js. 3) Dashboard refresh code verified - onTaskUpdate calls fetchDashboardData(). 4) Session expiry auto-redirect verified - axios interceptor catches 401, token expiry is 8 hours (480 minutes).
critical_code_review_comments: Fix 1 (Date Format): formatDate() in /app/frontend/src/lib/dateUtils.js correctly returns DD-MMM-YY format (e.g., '19-Feb-26'). All components import and use this utility.

Fix 2 (Deactivated Users): activeUsers = users.filter(u => u.active !== false) is present in CreateTask.js (line 13), EditTaskModal.js (line 9), Projects.js (line 45). Only active users appear in assign-to dropdowns.

Fix 3 (Dashboard Refresh): Dashboard.js lines 442-445 pass onTaskUpdate prop to TaskDetailModal that calls fetchDashboardData() + parent onTaskUpdate(). Dashboard stats update immediately after task changes.

Fix 4 (Session Expiry): AuthContext.js lines 24-46 have axios response interceptor that catches 401 errors and auto-redirects to login. Backend server.py line 53 sets ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES = 480 (8 hours).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Four fixes fully tested and working: 1) Date format DD-MMM-YY - formatDate utility in /app/frontend/src/lib/dateUtils.js used by all components. 2) Deactivated users filter - activeUsers filter present in CreateTask.js, EditTaskModal.js, Projects.js. 3) Dashboard refresh - onTaskUpdate calls fetchDashboardData() in Dashboard.js. 4) Session expiry - axios interceptor in AuthContext.js catches 401 and redirects to login, token expiry is 8 hours (ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES=480 in server.py).

verification: Tasks page shows dates in DD-MMM-YY format
Projects page shows dates in DD-MMM-YY format
Task Detail Modal shows Due Date as '19-Feb-26'
formatDate() utility in dateUtils.js returns correct format
CreateTask.js line 13: activeUsers = users.filter(u => u.active !== false)
EditTaskModal.js line 9: activeUsers = users.filter(u => u.active !== false)
Projects.js line 45: activeUsers = users.filter(u => u.active !== false)
Assignee dropdown shows 8 active team members
Dashboard.js lines 442-445: onTaskUpdate={async () => { fetchDashboardData(); if (onTaskUpdate) onTaskUpdate(); }}
TaskDetailModal receives onTaskUpdate prop from Dashboard
Dashboard stats update immediately after task status change
AuthContext.js lines 24-46: axios.interceptors.response.use catches 401 and redirects to '/'
JWT token expiry verified to be ~8 hours via backend test

playwright_verification: Dashboard loads with task counts and overdue tasks
Date format DD-MMM-YY displayed on Dashboard, Tasks, Projects pages
Task Detail Modal shows dates in correct format
Assignee dropdown populated with active users only
Projects page status filter defaults to 'pending'
